title.rendered: Enjoy the Perks of Flying Helijet

content.rendered:
Helijet is proud to be able to provide our guests with a safe, comfortable, and enjoyable experience from the first moment you step into a terminal.  Our comfortable terminals and colleagues are ready to welcome you, when you’re ready to travel.

Dine at Victoria’s Sunniest Patio at The Local

Once you check-in, we invite you to sit (at a safe social distance from others) and take in the waterfront views. Also enjoy a glass of local BC beer or wine, and a snack before boarding the aircraft for a beautiful flight across the Salish Sea.

Helijet is always looking at ways to expand and enhance this visitor experience, with added benefits and perks for our guests.  Following on from our August perk of complimentary Gray Line sightseeing tour with your roundtrip, we are happy to announce September’s perk.  Late summer on the West Coast brings plenty of pleasant days, and we are happy to work with two of our Victoria partners : The Sticky Wicket Pub +  Rooftop Patio and The Local to help you take advantage of some of Victoria’s best patios.

Sticky Wicket Pub

When you check-in for your next flight to Victoria, ask the agent for your discount card to either 15% off at The Sticky Wicket Pub + Rooftop Patio or 25% off at The Local.  Once you’re in Victoria take advantage of the discounts to soak up the last of the summer 2020 with a bite on the patio.

Discount available to all Helijet travellers with a confirmed reservation from Vancouver to Victoria:
The Sticky Wicket Pub + Rooftop Patio – 15% discount applicable for dine-in food, not usable on drinks, one per person until September 30, 2020
The Local – 25% discount applicable for any meal or appetizer, one per person per visit.
